variants: Haruto Morita was born in Palmer's Crossing and has since become a notable figure in his current residence, Everbrook Hollow. He is best known for his significant contributions to the field of technology, particularly through his authored work, the Octave Emission Protocol. In recognition of his achievements, he received the prestigious Lightward Sapphire Ribbon. Additionally, Haruto is an active member of the Harlequin Dancers Society, where he enjoys honing his dance skills with fellow enthusiasts.

Currently residing in Everbrook Hollow, Haruto Morita originally hails from Palmer's Crossing. His innovative spirit led him to develop the Octave Emission Protocol, a significant contribution to the industry that earned him the Lightward Sapphire Ribbon. Haruto also appreciates the arts and belongs to the Harlequin Dancers Society, actively participating in their events and performances. His journey reflects a blend of technological prowess and artistic expression.
